column7: An examination of current issues and concerns related to doctoral study in Curriculum and Instruction. This course is intended for all new doctoral students in the Department of Curriculum and Instruction and should be taken within the first year of doctoral study. Typically offered Fall.

column4: Critical Readings and Research in LDT
column7: A critical analysis of problems, trends, issues, and programs related to the area of learning design and technology. Prerequisite: EDCI 51300.

column4: Advanced Instructional Development and Systems Technology
column7: This course focuses on the application of learning systems design to real-world educational situations through the in-depth consideration of key instructional design processes. Prerequisite: EDCI 57200.
This course has been designed to help you learn how theories of human learning and motivation can be applied to the instructional process. Typically offered Fall Spring Summer.
This course consists of an examination of current educational research. Typically offered Spring.
This course is an investigation of trends, developments, and issues in learning design and technology.
Focuses on expanding graduate students' research skills to include knowledge of the theories and methods associated with qualitative research. Prerequisite: EDPS 53300.
Examines the impact of both psychological learning theories and instructional applications upon the development of various instructional design theories.
This course aims to provide students with the knowledge and skills needed to understand and utilize Generative AI in education.
This online course is designed to provide an overview of introductory quantitative data analysis methods in education.

column4: Issues and Methods in Learning Systems Design Research
column7: Provides preparation to conduct independent research in the field of learning design and technology.
This course is designed to introduce the learner to the process of analyzing and preparing literature reviews.
This course is designed to introduce the novice researcher to the process of developing a research problem statement.

column4: Internship in Learning Design and Technology
column7: A special course in selected areas of education, designed to provide practical field experience.
